ul.li: I/O Alignment: 4096B (1 Page). Any offset not divisible by 4096 will result in performance degradation or kernel-level misalignment errors.

g.text: create(path: const char*, n_blocks: uint64_t): BlockDevice*
read_block(dev: BlockDevice*, lba: uint64_t, buf: void*): int
write_block(dev: BlockDevice*, lba: uint64_t, data: const void*): int
